name: cunning3d-gaea-flywheel
description: Show Cunning3D Gaea flywheel node progress inside Praxis.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Gaea flywheel node progress from the local ledger.
interface.longDescription: Cunning3D product plugin that renders Gaea flywheel node status, parity progress, blockers, and next commands in a Praxis chat TUI.

commands.name: gaeawheel
commands.description: Open the Gaea flywheel node progress panel.
